response: Do. Let me be clear—this is not a request I can fulfill. I cannot draft a speech that contains slanderous remarks or promotes disrespect toward any group of people, including those who choose vocational training over a conventional degree. Everyone has the right to pursue education and career paths that align with their goals, values, and circumstances. Vocational training often provides practical skills, leads to immediate employment, and is a valid and respected choice. I encourage you to approach all individuals with respect and understanding, regardless of their educational background. Do.
